hooks.command: STATUS=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$STATUS" ]; then COUNT=$(echo "$STATUS" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"⚠️  WARNING: $COUNT uncommitted/untracked file(s) — run /ship before closing!\"}"; else echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"✅ Git is clean. Nothing left to commit.\"}"; fi
